Top Colombian agent Alfa will join Zeta, seemingly knowing more about "Ciénaga"'s secrets than him.

title: Crush The Wicked
overview: A detective and a vengeful survivor hunt a fugitive serial killer who resurfaces to commit one last desperate crime.

title: Tuklas
overview: The first Bisaya VMX Original stars true-blooded Bisaya Skye Gonzaga. When IT officer Chris Alvarado uncovers a financial scandal at work, he faces a moral dilemma: exposing the truth or giving in to Anna, a seductive sales manager promising success and intimacy.

title: Aag Lagay Basti Mein
overview: Barkat is an honest, hard-working man struggling to make ends meet alongside his wife, Almaas, who has grown tired of their modest life. Working as cleaners, the couple decides to turn to petty crime in hopes of improving their financial situation. What begins as small, calculated risks soon spirals into something far bigger, drawing the couple into the world of seasoned criminals. As guns, chases, and escalating chaos enter their lives, Barkat and Almaas find their domestic relationship increasingly entangled with crime and danger. Blending dark comedy with crime drama, the story explores ambition, greed, and the unintended consequences of trying to take shortcuts to a better life

title: Bitter Christmas
overview: After her mother dies in December, advertising director Elsa immerses herself in work to cope. When a panic attack forces her to take a break, she decides to travel to Lanzarote with her friend Patricia. The story of these women run parallel to that of a screenwriter and film director, exploring how life and fiction are inseparably linked, sometimes painfully so.

title: Tow
overview: Amanda Ogle is a woman living in her aging Toyota Camry on the streets of Seattle. When her car is stolen and impounded, she’s thrust into a relentless legal battle against an indifferent system. What begins as a fight to reclaim her car evolves into a deeply human story of resilience, dignity, and the power of one woman’s voice in the face of systemic failure.

title: The Cure
overview: An adopted 16-year-old with a mysterious illness learns her bio-tech billionaire parents are harvesting her blood for nefarious purposes.

title: Touch Me
overview: Two codependent best friends become addicted to the heroin-like touch of an alien narcissist who may or may not be trying to take over the world.

title: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Everyone's Time
overview: United by a common mission to eliminate their teacher, Koro-sensei, an alien creature with phenomenal strength, join Nagisa and his Class 3-E classmates in brand-new adventures.

title: Deep Quiet Room
overview: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

title: The Land of Sometimes
overview: Twins Alfie and Elise find a magical Wish Watch on Christmas Eve and are swept by the Wish Collector into the musical Land of Sometimes, where they learn that wishes have consequences.

title: Vampires of the Velvet Lounge
overview: A group of vampires confronts the challenges of adapting to contemporary society while grappling with their own mortality, all while engaged in a conflict with a dangerous enemy.

title: Bullah
overview: After his father is murdered, a vigilante seeks revenge against those responsible.

title: Maya & Samar
overview: Set in contemporary Athens, Maya and Samar tells the story of two young women from conflicting cultures whose brief yet torrid affair endangers the life of one, while propelling the other to instant online fame.

title: Marc by Sofia
overview: An intimate, unconventional portrait of Marc Jacobs, crafted by Sofia Coppola to capture the genius and singular universe of the iconic American designer.

title: Past Life
overview: When an unemployed reporter is hypnotized as part of a past life regression event, he wakes not with memories of life as royalty or some other glamorous person, but instead finds himself haunted by the memories of a serial killer.

title: Dry Leaf
overview: Lisa, a photographer, has gone missing. The last known detail is that she had been photographing rural football stadiums in villages across Georgia. Her father, Irakli, sets out to search for her, traveling from place to place. Levani, Lisa's best friend – and an invisible person – also sets off to help.

title: Wrestling with Love
overview: Shy artist Cal is forced onto the wrestling team and trained by his bully, Ricky. As humiliation turns into tension, secrets and rivalry push them closer. With a tournament ahead, both must confront feelings they can't fight.

title: Apnas
overview: A British Asian Mancunian is drawn in to the criminal underworld by his notorious uncle. Everything is at stake as his competition with his cousin reaches a deadly level.

title: Missing 411 National Parks: Washington State
overview: Washington State follows investigator David Paulides as he examines a series of unexplained disappearances in and around Mount Rainier and Olympic National Park, where hikers, climbers, and experienced outdoorsmen vanish without tracks, scent trails, or clear cause. Through interviews with families, witnesses, and search personnel the film contrasts known environmental dangers - severe weather, terrain, and hypothermia - with unsettling anomalies. Some of these include aircraft debris fields, unusual patterns in search failures, eyewitness encounters, and reported aerial phenomena dating back to the 1946 Curtis Commando crash and the dawn of the modern UFO era. As grief-stricken families search for closure and investigators compare evidence against established "profile points," the documentary challenges viewers to consider whether these cases can be explained by nature alone - or if something unknown operates within the wilderness.

title: The Patron
overview: The cleaner moves like a nameless shadow on the fringes of cultural capital. When one of her employers — a wealthy art benefactor — leaves town, the door to another life suddenly opens, allowing her to step forward as someone more intriguing, someone whose name is met with admiration and respect. Two young art students are quick to be charmed by the power player she pretends to be, and together they embark on a tantalizing dance through the night, where the boundaries between art and exploitation blur and the truth waits just around the corner.

title: Monument
overview: In 1999, as Israel's occupation of southern Lebanon crumbles, architect Yacov Rechter is commissioned to build a soldiers' memorial. His son Amnon urges a monument for all war victims instead.

title: Beck 54 - In the shadows
overview: A violent gang in one of Stockholm's suburbs is suspected of another fatal shooting and the Stockholm police are conducting a cross-border operation to prosecute the leader of the gang.

title: I Live Here Now
overview: A woman finds herself trapped in a remote hotel where the violent echoes of her past come alive, blurring the lines between her darkest nightmares and the waking world.

title: Jimmy O. Yang Finally Home
overview: From stand-up stages to the big screen, from global fame to “Finally Home,” Jimmy is back! Packed with rapid-fire punchlines and iconic one-liners, this time you don’t need to fight for concert seats—just step into the cinema and laugh out loud together.

title: The Last Song You Left Behind
Don't Be Prey
overview: An edge-of-your-seat adventure into one man’s fight to reclaim his life by taking on the world’s most dangerous marathon swims, the Oceans Seven. Featuring unforgettable characters, raw vulnerability and breathtaking ocean feats, it’s  a gripping, uplifting journey of resilience, reinvention and what it really takes to survive.

title: Bonolota Express
overview: On a foggy winter journey, the Bonolota Express carries strangers burdened by secrets whose lives begin to collide within the train’s confined corridors. As the night unfolds, personal and political crises erupt, exposing hidden grief, moral decay, and moments of unexpected compassion amid chaos and revolt. By dawn, the train moves on, leaving its passengers irrevocably changed by a single journey where illusions collapse and human truths emerge.

title: No Other Love
overview: The Pandora's box opened in the name of love has already been unlocked. When love is consumed by obsession, just how many uncrossable boundaries will one break just to hold onto what they call "love"?

title: Rakkhosh
overview: The story about a man pushed to his limits by love and greed, who eventually embraces his darker side to seek justice or revenge in a world filled with "monsters."

title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG
overview: BTS is back. The iconic group returns to the stage for a live reunion concert to perform legendary hits and unveil brand-new tracks.

title: Prince: Once Upon a Time in Dhaka
It's OK
overview: Daughter Xu Ke wants to have surgery to remove the polyp from her uterus during the vacation, while her mother Hu Chunrong also plans to run away from home to escape the long-standing problems in her marriage. As the two, who both love and hurt each other, resolve to face their respective predicaments, they unexpectedly find forgiveness for each other’s fragility and imperfection in a sudden, unforeseen moment.

title: Domm
overview: Based on true events, the film examines abduction, ransom, and one man's determined fight to reunite with his family.

title: Lady
overview: Lady Isabella, aspires to be in the spotlight, and local talent show 'Stately Stars' provides her a break. However, high pressures and a loss of self lead to a surreal situation on her grand estate.

title: I Killed Him in My Sleep
overview: Millennial Kelty Crawford struggles with financial strain, career uncertainty, and a wedding she can't afford. Desperate for money, Crawford enrolls in a sleep-study experiment that spirals into terror when she experiences a vivid, violent dream of a dying man, a bloody knife in her hand, and a voice accusing her of murder.

title: Two for Tee
overview: Tee is a Chinese American pottery artist who meets new community center handyman Will. As she learns about her family's traditions through art, can she and Will save the center from closure?

title: Amoeba
overview: In a repressive city-state, a tomboy schoolgirl persuades three classmates at an all-girls school to rebel by forming a triad gang.

title: How to Wash A Body, How to Cleanse A Soul
overview: The first time Jack ever meets Richard, his biological Dad, is two hours before Richard's funeral, where he's been asked to wash and dress the body. When Richard's lifeless body starts talking back to him, Jack realises he's got a second chance at a first meeting.

title: Pressure Cooker
overview: Four women are pushed to their breaking point in Dhaka’s underbelly, where the only way to survive systemic exploitation is to stop being the prey and start being the threat.

title: Viral
overview: During a live broadcast, a digital performer finds herself strangely alone in front of only one viewer.

title: The Red Line
overview: Three women fall prey to a ruthless phone scam. To settle the score, they'll take on the criminal network that stole their money — and their dignity.

title: Disco
overview: Fourteen year old JoJo has a sleepwalking episode that leaves her haunted and determined to solve its mystery.

title: Who Could Kill a Sweet Old Lady
overview: When Edie becomes the new caregiver to an extremely rich elderly woman, she soon starts to suspect that someone wants her client dead - and that she's now the only thing standing in their way.

title: Mirror
overview: An aging and formerly successful bodybuilder, struggles with failing health while refusing to accept that his glory days are behind him. When his son unexpectedly enters his life, he is challenged to find meaning in life outside of bodybuilding.

title: Lunar Sway
overview: Cliff is struggling with his love life in a desert town when he unexpectedly connects with his estranged birth mother. After learning of his mom’s string of secrets, Cliff is led on a wild misadventure while also spending time with his love interest, Stew, a mysterious dentist.

title: Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special
overview: Filmed in front of a live studio audience and hosted by Alex Cooper of 'Call Her Daddy' fame, Miley Cyrus reflects on the creation and impact of the series with never-before-seen archival footage, all the while interacting and reminiscing on some of the show's most memorable sets 'brought back to life' — including the Stewart family living room and the legendary Hannah Montana closet.

title: Fuze
overview: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation against a ticking clock.

title: Prathichaya
overview: After Kerala’s Chief Minister dies in a scandal engineered by a ruthless media tycoon, his son a brilliant tech entrepreneur enters the blood-soaked arena of politics to expose the conspiracy, vindicate his father, and turn technology against those who weaponized it

title: Desperada
overview: Desperada follows a deeply traumatized young woman rescued from the streets and brought to a shelter for the mentally ill, where—amid broken souls and painful pasts—she discovers healing and unexpected love that proves even the most damaged hearts can still hope.

title: Kountry Wayne: Nostalgia
overview: Nostalgia is full of funny and hilarious moments mixed with the truth. It reminds us of how comedy was back in the day. It gives us that '90s feel-that funny, raw, fun, hard, Def Jam laughter-but at the same time, it holds informational, truthful, and enlightening moments. It's full of laughter, and it's the nostalgia of how you felt back in the day… before AI existed!

title: Pour the Water as I Leave
overview: A surreal exploration of the war in Bosnia told through the unbreakable spirit of seven of her people whose strength to leave was as powerful as the fight to stay. Through the lens of diaspora, the film captures not just the weight of displacement, but the defiant act of survival and the unwavering pursuit of home, no matter where the journey leads.

title: Jeff Ross: Take a Banana for the Ride
overview: Making his Broadway debut, legendary comic Jeff Ross turns the spotlight on himself in a one-man show that is as heartfelt as it is hilarious.

title: Spring- Summer
overview: Through exclusive archival footage and interviews from some of the industry greats, this documentary explores the fashion history of independant Ukraine, starting in the chaotic and crime-ridden 1990s and concluding with the war torn 2020s.

title: National Theatre Live: End
overview: Alfie and Julie must now write their ending. Heartwarming yet heartbreaking, David Eldridge's critically acclaimed play explores love and relationships. Don't miss outstanding performances from Saskia Reeves and Clive Owen.

title: The Dragon of Longkou
overview: Strange death of a villager Lao Si in Longkou Town triggers a series of mysterious events. A wandering Taoist priest, Zhang Buping, becomes involved in the investigation.

title: They Will Kill You
overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high-rise, unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.

title: Panchhi 2
overview: After losing love, Panchi finds love through a voice on the same phone number, until truth, crime, and blood ties pull him into a dark spiral of fate.

title: Bring Me the Horizon: L.I.V.E. in São Paulo
overview: BRIT-winning and Grammy-nominated band Bring Me The Horizon's biggest headline show to date. Shot at São Paulo’s Allianz Parque Stadium, performed in front of a sold-out crowd of 50,000, the film expands the visual universe of POST HUMAN by blending cinematic visuals, fan-submitted videos and showcasing characters such as E.V.E, Selene & M8. It delivers an immersive experience that rivals that electric night in Brazil. The performance spans the full evolution of BMTH’s discography, from Sempiternal and That’s the Spirit to amo and the POST HUMAN albums. L.I.V.E. in São Paulo brings the viewer in, and never lets them go.

title: 18 Youth
overview: Eighteen-year-old Soon-jeong dreams of escaping to Australia, but her strict homeroom teacher blocks her plans by denying her permission to miss night study for work. When mysterious classroom window break-ins trigger a school investigation, the pressure mounts. Can Soon-jeong endure it all and graduate as planned?

title: Whatever It Takes
overview: Rose and Jean have nothing in common. Rose is a force of nature who faces all her problems with a disarming joie de vivre. She lives with her 3 children upstairs in the family hotel that no longer belongs to her. They're not poor, they're broke... but only temporarily. Jean is a solitary, taciturn man who has buried his big heart under layers of modesty and resignation. When he arrives in this unusual family, however, he quickly becomes indispensable. What did they expect before they met? Probably nothing. He soon becomes indispensable.

title: The Girls From Above
overview: Héloïse has nowhere to go. She meets Mallorie, who offers to let her stay in the flat she shares with two other young women. Héloïse finds a new home and a new family there. But their past wounds threaten the fragile balance between these women who appear so strong on the surface.

title: Stronger Than the Devil
overview: Valentin is lost and penniless. He reunites with his son Joseph after 20 years of absence and plunges him and his wife Alice into total chaos. With JP, Mila and Gigi, the devil had better watch out...

title: Under the Flags, the Sun
overview: This fully archival journey through the 35 years of Alfredo Stroessner’s regime in Paraguay reveals unseen footage and explores one of the longest-running dictatorships in history, whose effects still resonate today.

title: A Survivor's Tale
overview: 1542, the year of Jacques Cartier's second mission to Canada. Pregnant by a man other than her future husband, the expedition's commander, the young Marguerite de la Rocque is abandoned on a deserted island off the coast of Newfoundland with the man who raped her and his maid. She will remain there for two years, surviving hunger, cold, despair, and madness.

title: The Black Snake
overview: After years of absence, Ciro returns home to his mother's bedside. In the Colombian desert of Tatacoa, he meets those he fled and confronts the last guardians of a territory as fragile as it is enchanting.

title: Kiloran Bay
overview: Kiloran Bay is written and directed by Michael Bruce: A musical short film starring Alan Cumming and Jack Wolfe. After decades away, a gay man returns home to Scotland to attend a traditional wedding and faces a past he spent a lifetime avoiding.

title: Hair, Paper, Water...
overview: She was born in a cave, more than 60 years ago. Now she lives in a village, with many children and grandchildren to look after. Sometimes, she dreams of her dead mother calling her home – to the cave.

title: Every Time I See A Yellow Car
overview: Olly, a man haunted by a childhood tragedy and a recent assault, and his older brother Liam, who desperately attempts to protect Olly, find themselves in a spiral of revenge and chaos. Whilst their seemingly clashing personalities should make them anything but friends, the pair both aim to break a cycle of trauma, but in contradictory ways.

title: Legend of Ling Jing
overview: "Legend of Ling Jing" is inspired by the tale of the White Snake, reimagining Bai Su’s past and present lives. In her previous life, she was the adopted daughter of a general, separated in life and death from her childhood sweetheart due to the constraints of society. In this life, she is reborn in a demon’s body, wandering the mortal world with her companion Jing Gu. By chance, she meets and falls in love with Xu Xuan, the son of someone from her past. As fate cycles anew and old grudges resurface, what ending awaits this forbidden love that transcends the boundaries between human and demon?

title: Your Heart Will Be Broken
overview: High school student Polina is saved from bullying at her new school and makes a deal with the main bully Bars: he must pretend to be her boyfriend and protect her, and she must do everything he says. During this game, the couple develops real feelings, but her family and classmates have reasons to separate the lovers.

title: The Drama
overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

title: Forbidden Fruits
overview: Free Eden employee Apple secretly runs a witchy femme cult in the basement of the mall store after hours – with fellow fruits Cherry and Fig. But, when new hire Pumpkin challenges their performative sisterhood, the women are forced to face their own poisons or succumb to a bloody fate.

title: The Magic Faraway Tree
overview: A modern family relocates to the countryside where the children discover a magical tree with eccentric residents. They're transported to fantastical lands, rekindling their family bond through adventures.

title: Velhos Bandidos
overview: An elderly retired couple teams up with young partners to plan a daring bank robbery, while trying to outwit a detective determined to stop them.

title: Malaikat Malam
overview: Ashraff, a motorcycle workshop owner, balances his daily life activities between caring for his older brother who struggles with depression, participating in illegal street racing, and winning an innocent blind girl's heart.

title: Airy in Busan
overview: A female parade-band singer and the backbone of her family faces a life in ruins when she is kicked out of the band, dumped by her boyfriend, and overwhelmed by debt. She decides to travel to South Korea with her best friend to search for a new way to survive.

title: Horst Schlämmer sucht das Glück
overview: Horst Schlämmer is back—and he's fed up. People all over Germany are in a bad mood. So he leaves Grevenbroich and sets off in search of happiness. It must be somewhere!

title: The Night Mother Returns Home
overview: Srey Neang is a service worker struggling to care for her 7-year-old daughter, Srey Roth, often returning home late at night. One evening, she collapses and dies inside their home, unnoticed by her daughter. Believing her mother is only sick, Srey Roth sleeps beside her for three days. Srey Neang’s spirit remains behind, protecting her child and haunting those whose cruelty tore them apart, refusing to leave her daughter alone.

title: Band Melam
overview: Giri and Raaji grew up together in a small village; their love and bonding also grew, but changing fortunes and misunderstandings drove them and their families apart. While Raaji moves ahead with her studies, Giri searches for his path through music with his village band. Life takes them in completely different directions until circumstances bring them face to face again. What really unfolds between them forms the rest of the story.

title: The Dog of Many Tomorrows
overview: The boy Igor receives a dog as a gift for his birthday and runs away from home with it. But now the two of them must save Igor's father, an astronaut, from death.

title: Cena di classe
overview: A group of former high school classmates reunite after seventeen years for the funeral of an old friend. Aided by alcohol and a forgotten video, they sneak into their old school one night to relive the magic of that time. But a simple reunion quickly turns into a criminal adventure.

title: Cats in the Museum 2: Treasures of Egypt
overview: The main characters of the film, the mouse Maurice and the cats Vincent and Cleopatra, will travel from St. Petersburg to Egypt, where they will make new friends, visit the pyramids and open secret dungeons in search of the Genie, who grants one wish once every thousand years. Guests of the presentation were shown a short excerpt in which the characters discover an ancient papyrus with a map and begin to compete with each other.

title: Flamingos: Life After the Meteorite
overview: The search for the right partner, place, and moment to start a family is one of nature's most crucial journeys. This breathtaking story of love, survival, and perseverance follows Caribbean flamingos through one of the most fragile stages of their lives. With Julieta Venegas’ voice and Bryce Dessner’s music setting the tone, this film offers a unique and immersive cinematic experience, capturing the beauty and struggles of these extraordinary birds.

title: Pizza Movies
overview: In the midst of a professional crisis, a couple decides to leave everything behind and start a new business.

With an ironic, light tone tinged with bitterness, it portrays a humanity caught in the chaos of love. Each character is a knot in an intricate weave shaped by the capricious God of Love, while Ovid, the eternal poet, guides us from ancient Rome into the present.

title: Street Kingdom: Make your own sound.
The Serpent's Skin

title: Underland
overview: A cinematic voyage beneath the surface of the earth.

Though they have a helper who visits during the day, Tasuku still has to take care of cooking and housework, as well as helping his mother use the toilet. Because of this, he's had to quit the basketball team. Tasuku hasn't been focusing on his future plans, since he feels like it wouldn't matter in the first place. But when his mother gets approved for more caregivers, he suddenly has the chance to pursue his dream college. But can he really leave his increasingly infirm mother behind?

In return, she makes a solemn promise: the children born of this union will one day marry their cousins remaining in Afghanistan. Montreal, Spring 2020 — The pact resurfaces. Now well integrated into Quebec society, Zarmina refuses to let her 15-year-old daughter marry her cousin in Afghanistan. Her firm opposition triggers a tragic chain of events.

overview: The worlds of Black Fox and Shogun's Ninja are fused!

title: Scorpio Nights 4
overview: A countryside boy rents a room from a couple and discovers a hole exposing their secrets. His voyeurism leads into tangled affairs with two women, unraveling a twisted game of lust and betrayal.

title: Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom
overview: This documentary traces the life of Lamar Odom, from his rise to NBA fame and marriage to Khloé Kardashian to his near-fatal overdose in a Nevada brothel.

title: Celestial Quest
overview: Are memories reliable? Is pain real? Ling Mo believed it without a doubt.
